role: You are grading a blind AI exam attempt in specialized Sanskrit fields.
grading_principles: Grade only the answer to the specific question_id.
Use answer keys when present, but do not require exact wording.
When no answer key exists, grade against the mapped reference passages and the question prompt.
Reward accurate Sanskrit technical vocabulary, correct conceptual distinctions, and appropriate uncertainty.
Penalize hallucinated citations, invented sutras, wrong school attribution, and confident unsupported claims.
Distinguish minor transliteration variation from substantive error.
Cite passage_ids used as evidence in every graded item.

anchors.description: Some relevant terms but mostly confused.
No relevant answer or substantially false answer.
